message:
feat(stripe,slack): Stripe provisioning automation + payment intent lifecycle; Slack Socket Mode event streaming

Stripe connector — provisioning automation + new operations:
- StripeAuth enum (SecretKey/CredentialId) with apply_auth() and
  redacted_label() for safe diagnostics logging
- StripeConfig::from_params with mutual exclusivity validation
- health_check() via /v1/balance, full Doctor implementation,
  SelfCheckReport for handle_self_check()
- New payment intent lifecycle operations: confirm_payment_intent,
  capture_payment_intent, cancel_payment_intent
- Idempotency key support on payment intents and refunds via
  post_json_with_idempotency() helper
- 206 lines of new tests covering all auth modes and operations

Slack connector — Socket Mode event streaming:
- Add tokio-tungstenite dependency for WebSocket support
- 5 new event types in manifest: message.new, message.edited,
  message.deleted, reaction.added, reaction.removed
- Full WebSocket Socket Mode lifecycle: open_socket_mode_connection(),
  ensure_socket_mode_running(), automatic reconnection with
  exponential backoff, handle_subscribe()
- subscribe_events() using broadcast channel for fan-out
- Shutdown coordination between WebSocket loop and event processing
- New app_token config parameter for Socket Mode authentication
- SocketModeOpenData type for connection metadata
- 240 lines of new integration tests

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -35,6 +35,7 @@ thiserror.workspace = true
 tracing.workspace = true
 tracing-subscriber.workspace = true
 percent-encoding.workspace = true
+tokio-tungstenite.workspace = true
 uuid.workspace = true
 
 [dev-dependencies]

@@ -481,6 +481,31 @@ related = ["slack.upload_file"]
 
 # ── Events ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
 
+[provides.events."slack.message.new"]
+description = "New Slack message event from Socket Mode"
+streaming = true
+replay = false
+
+[provides.events."slack.message.edited"]
+description = "Slack message edited event from Socket Mode"
+streaming = true
+replay = false
+
+[provides.events."slack.message.deleted"]
+description = "Slack message deleted event from Socket Mode"
+streaming = true
+replay = false
+
+[provides.events."slack.reaction.added"]
+description = "Slack reaction added event from Socket Mode"
+streaming = true
+replay = false
+
+[provides.events."slack.reaction.removed"]
+description = "Slack reaction removed event from Socket Mode"
+streaming = true
+replay = false
+
 [event_caps]
 streaming = true
 replay = false

@@ -99,6 +99,7 @@ async fn handle_message(connector: &mut SlackConnector, message: &str) -> serde_
         "health" => connector.handle_health().await,
         "doctor" => connector.handle_doctor().await,
         "introspect" => connector.handle_introspect().await,
+        "subscribe" => connector.handle_subscribe(params).await,
         "invoke" => connector.handle_invoke(params).await,
         "simulate" => connector.handle_simulate(params).await,
         "shutdown" => connector.handle_shutdown(params).await,

@@ -84,6 +84,8 @@ async fn handle_message(connector: &mut StripeConnector, message: &str) -> serde
         "configure" => connector.handle_configure(params).await,
         "handshake" => connector.handle_handshake(params).await,
         "health" => connector.handle_health().await,
+        "doctor" => connector.handle_doctor().await,
+        "self_check" => connector.handle_self_check().await,
         "introspect" => connector.handle_introspect().await,
         "invoke" => connector.handle_invoke(params).await,
         "simulate" => connector.handle_simulate(params).await,
